reason: This is an educational/conference presentation video (SAGES/ILLS Session on Laparoscopic Liver Surgery chaired by David Geller, MD) consisting of research data slides, meta-analyses, and clinical outcomes summaries. It contains no actual FLS task performance (no Peg Transfer, Pattern Cut, Endoloop, Extracorporeal or Intracorporeal Suture demonstrations). The content is lecture-based research review material with no trainee or expert performance to evaluate.
content_summary: The video presents research outcomes and comparative analyses of laparoscopic versus open liver resection for hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC) and colorectal cancer metastases (mCRC), including multiple published studies, survival data tables, and randomized controlled trial results. No FLS fundamental task is performed.
recommendation: This video is not suitable for FLS scoring. If FLS task training or assessment is needed, please provide a video showing direct performance of one of the five FLS/MISTELS tasks (Peg Transfer, Pattern Cut, Endoloop, Extracorporeal Suture, or Intracorporeal Suture).
